_doc: General-tech track scoring weights (broad consumer-tech + crazy-story slot, added 2026-06-21). Loaded via scoring.load_weights(scoring.weights_path_for_track('general-tech')). vs the ai-vendor default in scoring_weights.json: niche_fit lowered (the general-consumer-AI accessibility rubric doesn't apply to general tech), hook_strength + verifiability + broll_feasibility raised (hook quality, fact-checkability of human-interest claims, and product/people stock availability matter more here), anti_cannibalization eased (general tech is a fresh, deep pool). The AI-vendor +0.05 bonus is suppressed for this track at the rank_candidates() call site (suppress_ai_vendor_bonus=True), NOT here. Keys must match scoring.DEFAULT_WEIGHTS exactly; sum is 1.0 and load_weights normalizes if it drifts.
